task.title: Debugging COBOL and CICS programs on AIX
task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to debug COBOL and CICS programs on AIX

taskbody.prereq: To debug COBOL and CICS programs on AIX by using the debug tools, you must ensure that you have the latest version of COBOL for AIX and the distributed debugger (idebug) for AIX. You can obtain the latest versions and PTFs from the COBOL for AIX website.

step.cmd: Open the Debug perspective and click Listen to begin listening on the AIX port.
To debug a CICS program or transaction, you must enable CICS for debugging.
Then, connect to CICS and use the CDCN transaction to note which host and port debugs which transaction or program before you start the transaction or program to debug.
On the AIX workstation, start the application by using idebug and indicate which host and port to connect to.
